quoteFirst: Before long, this portion of my property was also run through, and I was finally obliged to borrow the sportsman’s pointed slippers, in which I managed to get along over the ruggedest piece of creation I ever traversed, and reached our camp
quoteLast: Tired, hungry, and burnt by the sun, a bathe in the rushing torrent and a visit to the kitchen were soon accomplished, and I then learnt that the coolie, being stopped by the rock, had come back at once, and, having been again immediately packed off by F. to search for us, had not been since heard of.
